Door.Access.Door8800.Command.Data

类 Door8800WatchTransaction

    • Door.Access.Door8800.Command.Data.Door8800WatchTransaction

    INData

    public class Door8800WatchTransaction
extends java.lang.Object
implements INData
    监控数据的数据结构
